## Type of change
- [ ] New page
- [ ] Update existing page
- [ ] Fix (typo, link, accuracy)

## Docs checklist
- [ ] Frontmatter has `title`, `description`, and `order`
- [ ] Internal links resolve (`npm run check`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Sample verification question still answerable from published content
- [ ] Screenshots/code samples still match product behavior
